title: It’s Time To Put a Real Solution for Southwest Asia on the Table
description:
IPC #155 Friday, May 22, 11am ET/ 5pm CET

RSVP for Zoom link
https://schillerinstitute.nationbuilder.com/ipc_meeting

Following up from last week’s roundtable meeting, we are sending a combination of Mr. Davutoğlu’s proposal and LaRouche’s Extended Oasis Plan to the governments convening the UN Security Council special session on May 26, requesting that it be taken into consideration at this meeting. Please endorse and share Helga Zepp-LaRouches open letter “To the Governments of the United Nations: A Policy to Bring Peace and Development to Southwest Asia”

This week, we will be joined with Dr. Abdullah al-Ahsan, Professor of Comparative Civilization; Jesus Holguin Cazares, President Kansas Cattlemen's Association; and more to be announced.

Read Open letter here: https://schillerinstitute.nationbuilder.com/ipc_meeting
